title: ‘Life works in strange ways’: Lionel Messi on viral photo with Lamine Yamal ahead of Spain vs Argentina World Cup final
content:
• Lamine Yamal became UNICEF's newest Goodwill Ambassador this year.
• Lionel Messi has supported UNICEF since 2004 and became its Goodwill Ambassador in 2010.
• A viral photo of Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal was taken in 2007 during an FC Barcelona and UNICEF photoshoot, when Messi was 20 and Yamal was 5 months old.

title: 'We believe in...': White House defends Argentina team over displaying Falklands banner at World Cup semifinal
content:
• Argentina's Foreign Minister Pablo Quirno submitted a diplomatic note of protest on July 13 to the UK embassy in Buenos Aires, accusing the British warship HMS Medway of violating bilateral agreements near the Falkland Islands.
• The 1982 conflict over the Falkland Islands, following Argentina's invasion, resulted in the deaths of 649 Argentines and 255 Britons.
• Argentina faces potential disciplinary action from FIFA for possibly breaching its rules prohibiting political statements and symbols displayed during matches, after displaying a Falklands banner.
